items.title: LAST DAY to score Anker’s 2026 Prime Day deals: Up to 50% off Nano chargers, Qi2.2 stands, power banks, and more from just $10
items.summary:
Update 06/26: The final 24 hours of the 2026 Amazon Prime Day sale has officially kicked off, meaning it’s the last day to score Anker’s Prime Day deals and lock in the best prices of the year.

We are officially on Day 3 of Amazon’s Prime Day sale and are continuing to see fresh offers on many of our favorite gear. On top of the offers that went live earlier this week, Anker’s official Amazon storefront has now added several new deals to the mix, including an even deeper deal on its 14-in-1 Thunderbolt 5 dock. A handful of multi-device charging stations are also seeing additional price drops, and you’re looking at up to 50% in savings right now with these Prime Day deals. All the new ones, along with the existing Prime Day deals, are all ready and waiting for you below, so be sure to check them out if you haven’t already.

items.title: Score the still affordable MacBook Neo at $110 off during Prime Day before the price hike hits Amazon
items.summary: Apple’s sweeping price increases have now gone live on its official site, and will almost certainly their way to Amazon sooner than later to make that particularly affordable MacBook Neo not so affordable anymore. Now $100 more expensive at Apple, Amazon’s is still offering it at $10 under the old MSRP so you can effectively pick one up at $110 off right now – this might be the best deal we see in a long time and one that could be gone as early as tomorrow morning or sooner.

items.title: Land Prime Day pricing on AirPods Pro 3 while you still can, one of the best deals ever still live at $70 off
items.summary: The Day 3 Amazon Prime Day sale is now underway with hundreds of new discounts, but as some of the hottest deals we have tracked already have begun to disappear, we wanted to highlight this year’s AirPods Pro 3 offer. We have already started to see pricing on select current-generation Apple gear jump back up in price, but you can still land its latest AirPods Pro down at $70 off.

items.title: Final 24 hours of Amazon’s massive 2026 Prime Day starts now: Apple, Anker, LEGO, Android gear, more
items.summary: This it folks, the final 24 hours of the 2026 Amazon Prime Day sale has begun. You have until 1-day left to take advantage of the ongoing deals while they are still live (some of them are going quick) and you will now find all-new deals waiting in the Today’s Big Deals and Started Today deal section over on the main Prime Day landing page.

items.title: Logitech Prime Day Woot sale now live at up to 77% off: Deals on Mac and gaming accessories from just $10
items.summary: Woot’s Logitech sale is back for Prime Day, and we’re looking at a ton of new deals this time around with discounts reaching up to a whopping 70%. You can also use promo code DEALDAY26 and unlock additional savings of up to 20% (up to 25% as a new customer) to get deeper discounts over the prices highlighted for many of the brand’s popular peripherals on sale. Most of the gear on sale at Woot right now is in new condition, but you’ll also find open-box and refurbished units at even lower prices, like the MX Master 3S wireless mouse at just $56.24 Prime shipped with the prom code. Head below for more details.

items.title: Amazon might have just leaked a bunch of Grand Theft Auto 6 gameplay details
items.summary:
Grand Theft Auto VI pre-orders are in full swing at Amazon, Walmart, GameStop, and elsewhere, about gazillion people have already secured a copy, and Rockstar still hasn’t even showed us any real gameplay. It hasn’t even really detailed much more than the game world at this point, but Amazon is not only in the midst of its giant Prime Day sale right now, but it also might have just leaked some new tidbits regarding real-time protagonist switching, in-game social network action that ties into secret side missions, and more. 

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox.

items.title: One of the most affordable QD-OLED QHD 280Hz gaming monitors is now down to $350 for Prime Day (40% off)
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, the official INNOCN Amazon storefront is offering one of its affordable 27-inch QD-OLED 280Hz monitors for $349.99 shipped. This is regularly a $550 display, which is now seeing a $200 discount for Prime Day. That’s 40% off and the lowest price we have seen it drop at Amazon, coming in at $50 less than its previous all-time low. It doesn’t get much better than $350 for a QD-OLED QHD monitor with 280Hz refresh rate for your battlestation, so be sure to grab this one if you were looking to upgrade. The brand’s 500Hz QD-OLED and the 4K 240Hz QD-OLED models are also heavily discounted for Prime Day, and you’ll find them highlighted below.

items.title: Score Lexar’s 2TB tiny portable SSD for ProRes RAW files while it’s 52% off with a rare Prime Day deal
items.summary: Lexar’s Prime Day deals are still flying, and we wanted to highlight one of the standout offers while it’s still live. The brand’s 2TB Professional Go portable SSD in silver is down to $229.99 shipped right now. This is originally a $300 SSD, which jumped up to fetch as much as $480 in recent months at Amazon due to the memory and shortages. The Prime Day deal live on it right now takes 52% off to deliver a $250 discount – the steepest price drop we have tracked for it since the price hike. It’s one of the best SSD deals we’re tracking for Prime Day right now, so be sure to snag it while the offer is live.

items.summary:

For context, the smallest chip architecture prior to IBM’s breakthrough was Intel’s 18A, which is currently being used in its Panther […]

Update 06/25: A handful of new deals have been to Anker’s Prime Day sale for Day 3, and you’ll find them all below along the existing ones.

Many of these models are down to the lowest prices we have tracked for them, and they’re all ready and waiting for you right here. Head below for a closer look at the standout Anker Prime Day deals.

items.title: Apple just unleashed massive price increases on MacBooks, score them at up to $800 less during Prime Day
items.summary: Apple just announced some price increases on MacBooks and iPad. The AirPods Pro 3 are safe and still on sale at Amazon, but MacBook Neo just jumped $100, the M5 MacBook Air is now $200 more expensive, and MacBook Pro is wild $300 more than it was this morning, and the M5 Max MacBook Pro is an insane $500 more. These price increase have not landed on Amazon yet and that means you score these machines with what are effectively gigantic discounts – some of them are as much as $800 under the new list prices – get in there while you can:

items.title: Framework has good news and bad news
items.summary: Thanks to the component crisis, it's a bad time to want a new computer. But if you are waiting on a preorder for the Framework Laptop 13 Pro - which Framework's CEO has called the "MacBook Pro for Linux users" - the company shared good news on Thursday that might mean yours will cost less […]

items.title: Lectric’s Better-than-Prime Sale offers largest $385 bundle on the latest XPress2 e-bikes at $1,399, more from $799
items.summary: Running alongside the Amazon Prime Day Sale, Lectric has launched its Better-than-Prime e-bike Sale with up to $694 savings. Among the offers, you can find the newest XPress2 Long-Range Step-Thru Cruiser e-bike with $385 in FREE gear at $1,399 shipped, as well as the alternate XPress2 Long-Range High-Step Commuter e-bike with the same bundle at $1,399 shipped. Having just launched in May, these two models would normally run you $1,784 were it not for the discounts on the FREE bundled gear, which beats out the $336 launch and $286 Father’s Day bundles that came before. Head below to learn more about this new series and browse the full lineup of deals while they last through the 4-day savings event.

items.title: EcoFlow expands Prime Day Sale with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus savings, FREE gifts, 3x credits, more – all from $142
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day event, EcoFlow has officially launched its full Prime Day Sale lineup with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, FREE gifts, and 3x EcoCredit rewards. You can find major deals beating out most of the 2026 sale prices we’ve seen, like the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station that gets a FREE 170W 25K power bank at $1,519.05 shipped, after using the sitewide code 26EFPDAFF at checkout, beating out the station-only Amazon offer by $65. Down from $3,699 directly, since mid-January we haven’t seen much change in price on this model, with it having jumped up to $1,599 until March when it began bouncing between $1,899 and $1,699, with occasional spikes as high as $2,599. Now, not only are you getting much more savings ($1,080 off the going rate, $2,180 off the MSRP) to the second-best price of 2026, but you also get a free RAPID 170W 25K power bank at no extra cost ($80 value). Head below to get the rundown on all the Prime Day promotions and to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: Prime Day 2026 deal hub – Day 3: Prices drop even lower, new Doorbusters, and more
items.summary: Okay here we go folks, Day 3 of the 2026 Prime Day sale is now underway. Amazon has loaded its Started Today, Doorbusters, and Today’s Big Deal sections up with new offers and you can go get a look at them right here. The Apple deals are still rolling with loads of all-time lows, AirPods Pro 3 price drops, and more, but we also have an updated look at the Anker charging gear sale event with even lower prices, as well as even deeper deals across the Samsung Galaxy S26 lineup, and a whole lot more than that waiting down below.

items.title: Today’s Apple Books and audiobook deals from $1
items.summary: Day 3 of the 2026 Prime Day sale is still rolling and today’s lineup of the best Apple Books deals is now too. Highlights include Land’s End, Orion, Bite Me Like You Mean It, President Elect, Middle of Nowhere, Sons of Texas, Crash Dive, Situation Room, and more.And now, after Apple unleashed massive price increases on MacBooks, you can score them at AirPods Max 2 at up to $150 off, and the best deals ever on Apple Watch Series 11 are up for grabs. The books await below.

items.title: Anker eufy robot cleaners get up to 47% Prime Day savings, like the 2026 C28 robot vacuum and mop at a new $450 low, more
items.summary: As part of the Amazon Prime Day Sale, you can currently score up to 47% discounts on Anker eufy robot cleaners and accessories, like the popular 2026 C28 Robot Vacuum and Mop down at $449.99 shipped. Down from its $800 full price during this event, we’ve previously seen discounts only drop costs as low as $500 before all the Prime Day savings rolled in. Now, for a short while longer, you’ll be able to get a $350 markdown to a new all-time low price. You can find all the robot deals from this brand rounded up for you below – plus, all the best deals from this event rounded up into our Prime Day Green Deals hub here.
